label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's look at the passage and the question. The question is asking which of the following statements is TRUE about folk medicine based on the text. Let's analyze each option one by one. First, the passage says: "Folk medicine keeps the body healthy by using medicines taken from surrounding plants and herbs." That matches directly with option (A) - "It keeps one healthy by using medicines taken from plants and herbs." So, (A) seems to be true. Looking at option (B) - "It can treat most kinds of diseases for both man and animals." The passage mentions that folk medicine goes back to the time of earliest man and animals used plants and herbs, but it doesn't state that it can treat most kinds of diseases. Also, the passage says that animals used plants and herbs, but it doesn't explicitly say that folk medicine treats most diseases for both. So (B) might not be correct. Option (C) - "It is better than other medicines in curing serious diseases." The passage doesn't make any comparison between folk medicine and other types of medicine in terms of effectiveness for serious diseases. There's no mention of it being better. So (C) is probably not correct. Option (D) - "It was a way of body treatment used only in man's early history." The passage states that folk medicine goes back to earliest man, but it also says that one can practice it
